name: @radzor/subscription-billing
description: Manage recurring subscriptions with Stripe Billing. Create, update, cancel subscriptions, and handle lifecycle events like payment failures and renewals.

inputs.name: secretKey
inputs.description: Stripe secret API key (sk_live_... or sk_test_...).

inputs.name: webhookSecret
inputs.description: Stripe webhook signing secret for verifying subscription events.

outputs.name: subscription
outputs.description: The current subscription object with status, billing details, and plan info.

fields.name: priceId
fields.description: Stripe price ID for the subscribed plan.

fields.name: currentPeriodEnd
fields.description: Unix timestamp of current billing period end.

fields.name: cancelAtPeriodEnd
fields.description: Whether the subscription is set to cancel at period end.

outputs.name: subscriptionList
outputs.description: Array of subscriptions returned by listSubscriptions.

events.name: onSubscriptionCreated
events.description: Fired when a new subscription is created.

events.name: onSubscriptionCancelled
events.description: Fired when a subscription is cancelled.

events.name: onPaymentFailed
events.description: Fired when a subscription payment attempt fails.

actions.name: createSubscription

params.name: priceId
params.description: Stripe price ID for the plan.

actions.description: Create a new subscription for a customer.

actions.name: cancelSubscription

params.name: immediate
params.description: If true, cancel immediately. Otherwise cancel at period end.

actions.description: Cancel a subscription immediately or at the end of the current billing period.

actions.name: updateSubscription

params.name: newPriceId
params.description: New Stripe price ID for plan change.

actions.description: Update an existing subscription (change plan, adjust quantity).

actions.name: listSubscriptions

params.name: customerId
params.description: Stripe customer ID to list subscriptions for.

params.name: status
params.description: Filter by status (active, past_due, canceled, all).

actions.description: List all subscriptions for a customer, optionally filtered by status.

llm.constraints: Requires Stripe secret key (server-side only). Webhook endpoint must be publicly accessible. Customers must be created in Stripe before subscriptions. Use test keys during development.
